understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to reach or exceed the specified target x-coordinate as defined in the level's state, while managing the step budget to avoid failure.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object is adjacent, it may be pushed along, but walls can block movement or pushing, requiring observation of outcomes, and the SELECT action allows switching control to another object by specifying its ID.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | The block is adjacent to the right of the selected piece, so moving right will attempt to push it towards the target x=6, potentially achieving the goal in one step.
